prompt: Keep this logo almost exactly the same: the 'PACHA CHERRY' wordmark in glossy puffy 3D bubble lettering, cherry-red with a soft white outline glow and small sparkle stars, stays IDENTICAL. The ONLY change: restyle the pair of cherries above the text so they MATCH the wordmark's style — instead of the realistic photographic cherries, make them inflated, puffy, glossy candy BALLOON cherries in the same bright cherry-red with the SAME soft white outline glow around them and the same simple cartoon-glossy shading as the letters. The stem and leaf should also be the same simplified puffy bubble style with a white outline. The cherries and the text should look like one cohesive bubble-candy set, same material and same outline treatment throughout. Pure solid white background, centered contained lockup with margin.
